Constraint Dynamics in a Rydberg Array
← BACK
Seminar Note NOTE 2026.04.04

Constraint Dynamics in a Rydberg Array

A note on how blockade constraints limit the dynamics of a Rydberg array.

Constraints do more than reduce the set of allowed states: they reshape effective kinematics and observables.

The discussion starts with a minimal array.
